doc.description: Ground detection module to detect ground.

define.name: GROUND_DETECT_USE_INDI_THRUST
define.description: Use INDI thrust less than 50 percent as detection

define.name: GROUND_DETECT_AGL_MIN_VALUE
define.description: AGL value low enough to be used as ground detection [m]

define.name: GROUND_DETECT_USE_FORCE_SENSOR
define.description: Use FORCE_SENSOR ABI for ground detection

define.name: GROUND_DETECT_FORCE_SENSOR_THRESHOLD
define.description: Threshold on filtered force sensor value to detect ground

define.name: GROUND_DETECT_FORCE_SENSOR_MEDIAN_FILT_SIZE
define.description: Median filter size for force sensor processing

define.name: GROUND_DETECT_COUNTER_TRIGGER
define.description: Number of times a trigger must be valid to accept ground detection.
